name: monday.com (npx)
description: Interact with the monday.com Work OS via its API: query and manage boards, items, columns, updates, users, and workspaces. Runs locally through npx with read-only and dynamic API tool modes available.

inputs.label: monday.com API Token
inputs.description: Personal API token for your monday.com account. Found under your avatar > Developers > My Access Tokens, or in the Developer Center. Grants access scoped to your user's permissions.

obtain.instructions:
1. Log in to your monday.com account
2. Click your avatar (bottom-left) > Developers
3. Open 'My Access Tokens' (or Admin > API for the account token)
4. Copy your personal API token

auth.instructions: Generate a personal API token in monday.com under your avatar > Developers > My Access Tokens (see https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/authentication).
